titleStmt.title: SII 39.85: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 85. (A.R. No. 85 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE ŚA[ṬĀVARMAN] ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDARAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA-‘WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE THE CHŌḺA COUNTRY-22ND YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the sale of land called Karikālachōḻa-Pallavaraiyaṉ of Kuḍikkāḍu to the temple by a certain Tribhuvaṇaśiṅgaṉ, a native of Kuṉṟattūr in Kalvāyilnāḍu, a sub-division of Kēralaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī makkittikkumel śrīkoccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭaruḷiya śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya devaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 2vatu puṟamalaiṉāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār civataṉṭī
śvaramuṭaiyaṉāyaṉār ĀticaṇṭEśvartevaṟkku koḷaciṅka vaḷanāṭṭuk kalvāyil nāṭṭu kuṉṟattūr Uṭaiyāṉ kāṅkeyaṉ ṉati vaṉa ciṅkaṉeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉā runāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟa kuṭi
kkāṭṭukku vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikuṭutta paricāvatu nāṉ Iṉṉāṭṭuc ciṟukuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ Emalāṉa cikā raiyāṉum māṇikka ṉa Āḷavantāṉum taḷiyapūcalaṉ
ḷukku vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam paṇṇikkuṭutte
yum meṭuṉākkiṉa mara maṟṟu
m paṇṭāratte Oṭukka
teventira ciṅkappallavatarayaṉum makkaḷ vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupōkittu varukiṟa karikāla coḻappallavataraiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭu viṟpataṟku Icaintu Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷukku vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟakko
ṇṭu viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ tirapuvaṉa ciṅkaṉeṉ Uṭaiyār civadharmiśvavaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭeśvaratevaṟkku Ippaṭi tirunāmattukkāṇi kuṭiyāka viṟṟa karikāla coḻappallava taraiyaṉ
kāṭṭukku perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟke
Digital edition of SII 39.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
